blockers.title: Share-card meta does not cover every EN page
blockers.evidence: specs/polish.spec.md:10-14 requires every EN page's og:image + twitter:image to point at the absolute share card. privacy, safeguarding, and terms only set og:image plus twitter:card=summary, with no twitter:image: src/pages/privacy.astro:27-28, src/pages/safeguarding.astro:26-27, src/pages/terms.astro:27-28. 404 has no share-card head tags at all: src/pages/404.astro:10-15.
blockers.required_fix: Add absolute twitter:image and summary_large_image card metadata wherever EN pages define share metadata, including legal pages and 404, or centralize the default in Base. Add coverage that checks all public EN pages, not only home.

non_blocking_notes: No diff-scoped authorization, minor-lane, consent, or audit-trail regression found; this polish diff is mostly static assets, metadata, fonts, CSP, and styling.
Build/e2e were not run in this read-only Gate 4 review; Gate 5 still needs the full project verification.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Branded share card on every page
spec_compliance.evidence: Share-card assets are 1200x630 and absolute og:image is present on many pages, but twitter:image is missing on EN legal pages and 404 has no card metadata.
Base imports @fontsource packages and source search found no fonts.googleapis/fonts.gstatic runtime links.
portal/verify use Base and src/portal/ui.ts uses var(--display), var(--body), and var(--mono).
home and AR hero images now use direct src with loading="eager" and fetchpriority="high".
--gold-deep is used for gold rung text; active language pill uses dark text on sky.
512, 180 apple-touch, and 32 favicon PNGs exist and are wired in Base.
tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts:101 adds EN and AR home og:image assertions.
Deferral is recorded in the spec; no astro:page-load re-init was introduced.

summary: Do not ship until the share-card metadata satisfies the explicit every-EN-page twitter:image requirement.
